<sbproxy-retrieval>
<sbproxy-query>
Which synthetic signal is active?
</sbproxy-query>
<sbproxy-chunk id="signal-evidence" score="0.99" format="text">
EVIDENCE::signal=violet. The independently invented active signal is violet.
</sbproxy-chunk>
<sbproxy-chunk id="calibration-evidence" score="0.85" format="text">
EVIDENCE::source=calibrated. The synthetic reading came from the calibrated sensor.
</sbproxy-chunk>
